name: graph-grammar-monorepo
description: Monorepo for the graph-grammar engine (library), the interactive workbench (app), and the documentation site.

scripts.build: pnpm run build:lib && pnpm run build:editor && pnpm run build:web && pnpm run build:docs
scripts.test: pnpm --filter graph-grammar test && pnpm --filter graph-grammar-react test && pnpm --filter fallout-quest-scraper test
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter graph-grammar typecheck && pnpm --filter graph-grammar-react typecheck && pnpm --filter @graph-grammar/web typecheck && pnpm --filter fallout-quest-scraper typecheck
scripts.release: pnpm run build:lib && pnpm run build:editor && changeset publish
